description: This course is designed to introduce students to the essential theoretical approaches to international politics, to explore important historical and contemporary questions and debates in international affairs, and to teach students to think critically about international relations. The course also introduces students to the skills and methods necessary for successful online learning.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in the International Politics and Practice Capstone Certificate

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in the International Politics and Practice Capstone Certificate
